name: QA 193
description:
PCP QA Test No. 193

bogus pdus attacking pmcd causing core dump or looping pmcd

pv 935490



Copyright (c) 2005 Silicon Graphics, Inc.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2004 reproduce
